name: badgehub-app
description: > Node.js REST service for the BadgeHub

scripts.check:ts: pnpm --filter frontend check:ts && pnpm --filter badgehub-api check:ts
scripts.backup: docker compose --env-file infra/badgehub/.env.prod -f infra/badgehub/docker-compose.yml exec -T db sh -c 'PGPASSWORD="$POSTGRES_PASSWORD" pg_dump --username "$POSTGRES_USER" "$POSTGRES_DB"'
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm --filter badgehub-api run test-db:up && pnpm --filter badgehub-api dev
scripts.dump-db: docker compose --env-file packages/backend/.env -f packages/backend/docker-compose.test-db.yml exec -T db sh -c 'PGPASSWORD="$POSTGRES_PASSWORD" pg_dump --username "$POSTGRES_USER" "$POSTGRES_DB"'
scripts.validate: pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
